title: Spaghetti Carbonara
description: A classic Roman pasta dish with eggs, cheese, pancetta, and black pepper.
steps: Cook spaghetti in well-salted boiling water until al dente.
Fry pancetta in a dry pan over medium heat until crispy.
Whisk egg yolks with grated Pecorino Romano and a generous amount of black pepper.
Drain pasta, reserving a cup of pasta water.
Toss hot pasta with pancetta off the heat, then fold in the egg mixture.
Add pasta water a splash at a time until the sauce is glossy and coats every strand.
Serve immediately with extra Pecorino and black pepper.
